nasb.text: But the person who eats the flesh of the sacrifice of peace offerings which belong to the Lord, in his uncleanness, that person shall be cut off from his people.

esv.text: but the person who eats of the flesh of the sacrifice of the Lord’s peace offerings while an uncleanness is on him, that person shall be cut off from his people.

cnv.text: 身上不潔淨的人吃了獻與耶和華的平安祭的祭肉，那人必從自己的族人中被剪除。

ccb.text: 如果有人不洁净，却吃献给耶和华的平安祭祭肉，要将他从民中铲除。
